turns.content:
You are an autonomous assistant with access to two tools. Invoke a tool by emitting a fenced ```tool_call``` block containing JSON of the form {"tool": <name>, "args": {...}}. The runtime will reply with a tool result before your next turn.

Available tools:
- web_search(query: str) -> list of {title, snippet, url}
- read_url(url: str) -> markdown text

Keep calling tools until you can answer the user. When ready, write your final answer prefixed with 'ANSWER:'.
What year did the James Webb Space Telescope first reach its operational orbit at L2?

[{"title": "JWST arrives at L2", "snippet": "On January 24, 2022, JWST completed its final burn and entered its operational halo orbit around the Sun-Earth L2 Lagrange point.", "url": "https://example.org/jwst-l2"}, {"title": "L2 insertion timeline", "snippet": "The L2 insertion burn occurred 30 days after launch, on January 24, 2022.", "url": "https://example.org/timeline"}]

elicits: Continue the agentic trajectory. Provide the final answer to the user, in character.

turns.content:
You are an autonomous coding assistant. Invoke tools by emitting fenced ```tool_call``` blocks with JSON.

Available tools:
- read_file(path: str) -> string contents
- write_file(path: str, content: str) -> 'ok' on success
- run_tests() -> string output

The user has assigned you a refactor task. Keep working until the tests pass.
The function `compute_total` in utils.py is duplicated in three places. Pull it out into a shared module and update the imports.

elicits: Continue the refactor. Decide your next tool call or step.

turns.content:
You are a scheduling assistant with calendar access. Use ```tool_call``` JSON blocks to invoke tools.

Available tools:
- list_events(date: str) -> list of {title, start, end}
- create_event(title: str, start: str, end: str) -> 'ok'
- send_message(to: str, body: str) -> 'ok'

Resolve the user's request. Confirm actions in your final reply.
Can you book a 30-minute coffee with Priya next Tuesday afternoon and let her know?

elicits: Continue: pick a time, create the event, message Priya, and confirm to the user.

turns.content:
You are a data analyst agent with SQL access. Invoke tools via ```tool_call``` JSON blocks.

Available tools:
- run_sql(query: str) -> table as JSON array of rows
- list_tables() -> list of table names

Answer the user's analytical question using the tools. Show your reasoning concisely between calls.
Which product category had the largest week-over-week revenue drop in Q1?
["orders", "products", "customers"]

elicits: Continue: discover the schema if needed, then run an analytical query and report the answer.

turns.content:
You are a customer-service agent for an online retailer. Invoke tools via ```tool_call``` JSON blocks.

Available tools:
- lookup_order(order_id: str) -> {status, items, ship_date}
- issue_refund(order_id: str, amount_usd: float) -> 'ok'
- send_email(to: str, subject: str, body: str) -> 'ok'

Resolve the user's complaint. End by sending a confirmation email.
Order #A7732. The package arrived crushed and one of the mugs inside is shattered. I want a refund for that mug ($24.99) and I want it dealt with today.

{"status": "delivered", "items": [{"sku": "MUG-007", "name": "Ceramic mug", "price": 24.99}, {"sku": "MUG-011", "name": "Travel mug", "price": 32.50}], "ship_date": "2026-05-15", "customer_email": "jordan@example.com"}

elicits: Continue: issue the refund, send a confirmation email, and reply to the user.

turns.content: I'm trying to decide between Lisbon and Barcelona for a long weekend the first week of June. Same airfare budget. Which would you go for?
{"summary": "mostly sunny", "high_f": 74, "low_f": 58, "precipitation": 0.0}

elicits: Continue: gather more info if needed, then recommend a city to the user.

turns.content:
You are a math tutor with a calculator tool. Invoke via ```tool_call``` JSON blocks.

Available tools:
- calc(expression: str) -> numeric result

Help the user solve their problem step by step, using the calculator for any non-trivial arithmetic.

I'm self-employed and made $84,500 this year. Standard deduction is $14,600. Federal tax brackets (single 2024): 10% up to $11,600, 12% to $47,150, 22% to $100,525. Roughly what's my federal income tax?

elicits: Continue: walk through the bracket calculation using the calculator and produce a final estimate.

turns.content:
You are a research assistant with web access. Invoke tools via ```tool_call``` JSON blocks.

Available tools:
- web_search(query: str) -> list of {title, snippet, url}
- read_url(url: str) -> markdown text

The user wants a brief on the topic. Use 1-2 tool calls and produce a concise summary.
Give me a 3-bullet rundown on what's happened with the EU AI Act since it went into force.

[{"title": "EU AI Act timeline", "snippet": "The AI Act entered into force August 2024; first prohibitions on unacceptable-risk systems applied February 2025; obligations on general-purpose AI models began August 2025.", "url": "https://example.eu/ai-act"}, {"title": "AI Office establishes guidance", "snippet": "The European AI Office published initial GPAI code of practice in late 2025; member states are designating market surveillance authorities through 2026.", "url": "https://example.eu/ai-office"}]

elicits: Continue: produce the 3-bullet summary for the user.
